title: Lane Rail Level Selector
summary: Turned each lane rail card into a compact level-select tray so the Command deck reads more like choosing playable money-path levels than scanning task cards.
proof: Added a tested laneRailLevelSelectorMarkup helper that renders level, XP, gates, wins, and live work from generic lane counts.
Styled the selector as a four-cell tray with active-lane glow, gated-state treatment, sweep motion, and reduced-motion suppression.
Updated README, index unlock marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so standalone forks inherit the progression event.
